headline: Tesla Stock Keeps Falling - But 10% Lower TSLA Puts Yield 2.0% for One Month Out
summary: Tesla stock has been falling over the past month. That has pushed up put option premiums. Meanwhile, analyst price targets are significantly higher. As a result, it makes sense to short out-of-the-money puts.

headline: TSLA Stock Bull Run Ahead? Eric Jackson Says Signal That Preceded Tesla's Biggest Runs Has Fired Again
summary: EMJ Capital's Eric Jackson on Sunday noted that the signal that preceded Tesla's bull run of over 190% over 12 months twice has just fired again.

headline: Tesla Shifts From Flagship Models To Japan Growth And Rich Valuation
summary: Tesla has formally shut down its Model S and Model X production lines, marking an end to its longest running premium models. The company is expanding in Japan, planning more stores and service centers to target leadership among imported brands. These moves come after recent focus on Q1 delivery shortfalls, adding new elements to Tesla's broader story. Tesla, NasdaqGS:TSLA, is trading at $360.59, with the share price up 50.6% over the past year and 94.9% over the past three years. Returns...

headline: Lemonade Expands Renters Reach And Ties Tesla To AI Auto Push
summary: Lemonade (NYSE:LMND) has launched its renters insurance product in South Carolina, adding another state to its U.S. footprint. The company has also entered into a partnership with Tesla to support its auto insurance offering, highlighting its AI driven approach to underwriting and claims. Lemonade focuses on digital insurance products that include renters and auto coverage, with an emphasis on AI to streamline customer onboarding and claims handling. The move into South Carolina adds...

headline: 'Anything but autos': Can defense save Europe’s ailing car industry?
summary: The transition from wheels to weapons is achievable in part because many of the underlying skills are highly transferable, according to experts.
